course.name: Foundation in Computing
course.description: Builds essential programming and mathematics skills for IT fields.

course.name: Foundation in Business
course.description: Introduces management, marketing, and accounting fundamentals.

course.name: Foundation in Engineering
course.description: Covers core mathematics and physics for engineering pathways.

course.name: BSc Computer Science
course.description: Focuses on software development, algorithms, and networks.

course.name: BSc Software Engineering
course.description: Emphasises software design, testing, and project management.

course.name: BSc Data Science
course.description: Covers data analysis, statistics, and programming techniques.

course.name: BSc Business Management
course.description: Develops leadership and strategic business skills.

course.name: BSc Mechanical Engineering
course.description: Studies mechanics, thermodynamics, and manufacturing systems.

course.name: MSc Data Science
course.description: Advanced machine learning and big data analytics.

course.name: MSc Artificial Intelligence
course.description: Specialises in AI systems, neural networks, and automation.

course.name: MSc Computer Science
course.description: Advanced topics in cloud computing and cybersecurity.

course.name: MSc Business Analytics
course.description: Combines data analysis with business decision-making.

course.name: MSc Engineering Management
course.description: Integrates engineering principles with leadership skills.
